title: calendula suffruticosa subsp. maritima
intro: Calendula suffruticosa subsp. maritima is a subspecies of the calendula plant, which is a flowering plant that belongs to the daisy family. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Calendula suffruticosa subsp. maritima include wound healing, skin soothing, and protection against infection, making it a popular natural remedy for skin conditions such as acne, eczema, and dermatitis. Calendula suffruticosa subsp. maritima can be prepared into herbal remedies such as infusions, tinctures, and creams, which can be used topically to reap its medicinal benefits.
